name: Crab Souffle Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the crabmeat coarsely and mix with chives, dill, salt, pepper, cayenne, cottage cheese, and egg yolks.
2. Beat the egg whites until they form a soft peak and fold into the crab mixture.
3. Grease a large skillet or griddle generously with butter and heat until the butter bubbles.
4. Form each pancake from 3 tablespoons of batter.
5. Cook one side for 2 to 3 minutes until the bottom is browned and set.
6. Flip carefully with a wide spatula. Do not attempt to flip too soon, or the pancakes will fall apart.
7. Cook on the other side for another 2 to 3 minutes until the pancakes are set.
8. Transfer to a warm platter and continue cooking until all of the batter has been used up.
9. Makes four servings.
